productDisplayName: Nike Men's Ballista II White Grey Shoe
description: Sleek and yet aggressively designed, the nike Ballista casual running shoes are replete with comfort and style. Ergonomically designed and well cushioned, it's a great shoe for runs and casual occasions.Upper Meshed upper for ample breathability Perforated synthetic overlays for structure, midfoot support and ventilation Lacing system for snug Fit and protection from chaffing Plush padded tongue and collar for enhanced comfort Cushioned sockliner for in-step comfort and snug fit Reinforced overlays on heel cup and above toe guard for enhanced durability and protection Midsole Cushioned footbed for comfort and impact protection EVA midsole for durability and enhanced shock absorption Padded back sole to lock the foot in place Outsole High quality rubber outsole for enhanced durability Forefoot and backfoot outsole in a waffle pattern for maximum traction and durability Deep flex groove on mid forefoot for flexible movement Arched midfoot to support the inner arch Forefoot outsole reinforced onto the upper as a toe box for enhanced protection to the forefoot Shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
